ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  "tallest_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tallest city in the country */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on a specific metric (e.g., population, number of cities) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "number_of_cities" INTEGER /* Total number of cities in the country */,
  "num_per_10mil_pop" REAL /* Number of cities per 10 million population */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_tallest_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("tallest_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the city belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "is_tallest" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the city is the tallest in the country */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city ranking */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric on which the city is ranked (e.g., population, economic activity) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank compared to the previous year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data (e.g., UN, World Bank) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., GDP, literacy rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric value (e.g., USD, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., census, estimate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., country, city) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., country, city, metric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the resource type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code to visually distinguish the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
